'''鈭歡-v-h''' ('''kagavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valse|valse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valse|valse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagavah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigavah|thigavah]] || [[word:jigavah|jigavah]] || [[word:shigavah|shigavah]] || [[word:kigavah|kigavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugavah|thuthugavah]] || [[word:jujugavah|jujugavah]] || [[word:shushugavah|shushugavah]] || [[word:kukugavah|kukugavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugavah|thugavah]] || [[word:jugavah|jugavah]] || [[word:shugavah|shugavah]] || [[word:kugavah|kugavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugavah|thugavah]] || [[word:jugavah|jugavah]] || [[word:shugavah|shugavah]] || [[word:kugavah|kugavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegavah|thegavah]] || [[word:jegavah|jegavah]] || [[word:shegavah|shegavah]] || [[word:kegavah|kegavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogavah|thothogavah]] || [[word:jojogavah|jojogavah]] || [[word:shoshogavah|shoshogavah]] || [[word:kokogavah|kokogavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogavah|thogavah]] || [[word:jogavah|jogavah]] || [[word:shogavah|shogavah]] || [[word:kogavah|kogavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogavah|thogavah]] || [[word:jogavah|jogavah]] || [[word:shogavah|shogavah]] || [[word:kogavah|kogavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gavah|th忙gavah]] || [[word:j忙gavah|j忙gavah]] || [[word:sh忙gavah|sh忙gavah]] || [[word:k忙gavah|k忙gavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagavah|thathagavah]] || [[word:jajagavah|jajagavah]] || [[word:shashagavah|shashagavah]] || [[word:kakagavah|kakagavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagavah|thagavah]] || [[word:jagavah|jagavah]] || [[word:shagavah|shagavah]] || [[word:kagavah|kagavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagavah|thagavah]] || [[word:jagavah|jagavah]] || [[word:shagavah|shagavah]] || [[word:kagavah|kagavah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagavah|shagavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagavah|goshagavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagavah|gokishagavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagavahn眉|shagavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagavahnkn眉|goshagavahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavahn眉|gokishagavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagavahsh毛|shagavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagavahnksh毛|goshagavahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagavahsh毛|gokishagavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavahro|shagavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavahnkro|goshagavahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavahro|gokishagavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavahmu|shagavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavahnkmu|goshagavahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavahmu|gokishagavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagavahsher|shagavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagavahnksher|goshagavahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagavahsher|gokishagavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagavahng|shagavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagavahnkng|goshagavahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagavahng|gokishagavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagavahya|shagavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagavahnkya|goshagavahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagavahya|gokishagavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagavahyam|shagavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagavahnkyam|goshagavahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagavahyam|gokishagavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavahn眉sh毛|shagavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavahnkn眉sh毛|goshagavahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavahn眉sh毛|gokishagavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavahn眉ro|shagavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavahnkn眉ro|goshagavahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavahn眉ro|gokishagavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavahn眉mu|shagavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavahnkn眉mu|goshagavahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavahn眉mu|gokishagavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavahsh毛n眉|shagavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavahnksh毛n眉|goshagavahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavahsh毛n眉|gokishagavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavahsh毛ro|shagavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavahnksh毛ro|goshagavahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavahsh毛ro|gokishagavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavahsh毛mu|shagavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavahnksh毛mu|goshagavahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavahsh毛mu|gokishagavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavahron眉|shagavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavahnkron眉|goshagavahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavahron眉|gokishagavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavahrosh毛|shagavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavahnkrosh毛|goshagavahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavahrosh毛|gokishagavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagavahromu|shagavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagavahnkromu|goshagavahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagavahromu|gokishagavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagavahmun眉|shagavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagavahnkmun眉|goshagavahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagavahmun眉|gokishagavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagavahmush毛|shagavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagavahnkmush毛|goshagavahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagavahmush毛|gokishagavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagavahmuro|shagavahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagavahnkmuro|goshagavahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagavahmuro|gokishagavahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
